package.name: coche_urdf
package.description:
Minimal IFS-08 URDF for the DV pipeline's robot_state_publisher.
This is a *placeholder* URDF: chassis box + four cylindrical wheels + steering joints, with rough IFS-08 dimensions. Good enough for TF publishing and basic Foxglove visualisation; not representative of the real chassis geometry, has no collision geometry, no inertials.
A real URDF (re-authored from SolidWorks, with proper meshes, inertials, and tight wheel kinematics) is the eventual replacement — see issue #142 (CoG bias) for the related physics asset rework.
